contract: All MetaBlooms work begins by loading BOOT_REQUIRED_GATES_v1 through boot_critical_governance_loader_v1.py.
The boot executor must invoke the loader and report loader verdict in the boot receipt.
The chat governance kernel remains the always-on turn controller; the router is subordinate to it.
The scatter validator blocks promotion when governance files exist in controlled paths but are not registered.
A complete-system export is not promotable unless fresh extraction proves these checks still pass.
host_limit_note: A ZIP cannot force the ChatGPT model host to call code. This contract closes the OS-level gap by making any MetaBlooms OS stage invalid unless the first stage action calls the loader and writes evidence.
problem: Prior gates were created as artifacts but were not always invoked at chat start or export promotion, so they disappeared or were bypassed in later OS iterations.
